backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor with no backend logic.
feature_evidence.json: Metadata file listing app features, associated files, components, and confidence levels for the Valentine flow.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries describing the purpose and animation features of all key frontend pages and components.
frontend/index.css: Empty stylesheet placeholder at the frontend root.
frontend/index.html: Basic HTML shell that mounts the React app and loads main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React component controlling step navigation and user name state throughout the Valentine flow.
frontend/src/components/HeartsBurstOverl: Full-screen 3‑second heart-burst animation overlay that triggers a completion callback.
Shared layout adding themed background, gradients, floating hearts, and footer around page content.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook that creates and manages a backend actor using Internet Identity and react-query.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context and hooks for managing Internet Identity login, state, and persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Intentional placeholder file noting that no backend queries are used.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind-based stylesheet defining Valentine color tokens and many custom animation utilities.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Entry point that sets up React rendering with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/FinalYesPage.tsx: Displays the final celebration screen showing the user's name with animations and buttons to restart or return to the main question.
frontend/src/pages/FirstNamePage.tsx: Collects the user's first name with validation and a continue button.
frontend/src/pages/LastNamePage.tsx: Collects the user's last name with back and continue controls.
frontend/src/pages/LoveSliderPage.tsx: Shows a love percentage slider that triggers an animation and completion event when reaching 100%.
frontend/src/pages/ValentineMainPage.tsx: Asks the user if they will be the valentine, showing their name and Yes/No buttons.
frontend/src/pages/WrongAnswerPage.tsx: Presents a wrong-answer screen with an angry emoji and a button to return.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind theme extensions, colors, animations, and plugin usage for the project.
project_state.json: Defines project metadata for a multi-step Valentine-themed website, including intro flow, slider gating, themed assets, and navigation logic. Also lists image requirements, existing features, and architectural notes.
